messages.body: Hello Nima,  Hope you’re doing well!  Your account was cancelled 10 days ago and the refund was credited as well.   Request you to kindly check and let me know.
any update on this?
Sure, Nima!   I’ll process the cancellation and the refund the latest  payment.
Hey monisha. I just really want to cancel and have the charge error refunded. I dont think this is a good fit for my business at the present moment.  Thanks for understanding and your efforts.
any updatw?
